inputs.label: Annual Family Income
inputs.businessContext: Total gross annual income of the family before taxes

inputs.label: Total Assets
inputs.businessContext: Total value of family assets including savings, investments, and property equity

inputs.label: Number of Dependents
inputs.businessContext: Number of dependent family members including the student

inputs.label: Annual Cost of Attendance
inputs.businessContext: Total annual cost of attending the educational institution including tuition, fees, room, and board
